resources.string: GlowEdge needs permission to draw the glow on top of your screen. This is the core of the app.

GlowEdge uses this only to read the music rhythm for the glow. Your audio is NEVER recorded, saved, or sent anywhere, and the app has no internet access. You can skip this and still use notification glow.
Allow a small notification so the glow can run reliably in the background. You can stop it anytime from there.
Glow is running — it reacts while music plays.
Glow is off. Tap Start Glow to begin.
Glow reacts only to music, naat & melodic audio — not to normal talking or notification sounds.
Left = strict (only clear music) · Right = relaxed (more sounds)
Lighter glow effects that use less power.
Start the glow automatically when your phone turns on.
Flash the edges in an app color when a message or notification arrives. Works even without music.
Please allow notification access for GlowEdge to detect messages.
GlowEdge turns your music, naat and melodic audio into a living glow around your screen edges. Completely free — every style and feature unlocked.

• Styles tab: Pick how the glow looks. Tap a style card or its Apply button to use it. The Live Preview shows the selected style animating.

• Start / Stop Glow: Turns the edge glow on or off. When on, the glow appears only while music plays.

• Test Glow: Shows a quick glow to confirm it works on your phone.

• Settings tab: Music-Only Mode, detection sensitivity, color theme, thickness, speed, intensity, Battery Saver, Auto-Start and Notification Glow.

• About tab: How the app works, features, privacy and copyright.

GlowEdge uses a built-in smart audio algorithm to tell music, naat and melodic audio apart from normal talking. It listens in real time to how the sound spreads across frequencies, its bass/treble balance, rhythm steadiness and sustain — all on your device, nothing recorded or sent. Use the Sensitivity slider if a naat or song is missed.

✦ 11 visualizer styles
✦ 7 color themes incl. full Spectrum
✦ Music-Only smart detection
✦ Notification Glow
✦ Live Preview
✦ Thickness, speed & intensity controls
✦ Battery Saver & Auto-Start
✦ Works with headphones & earbuds
✦ No ads · No tracking · No internet access

GlowEdge is built to be trusted:

✓ No internet permission, so your data cannot leave your phone.
✓ Nothing is recorded, collected, or shared. Ever.
✓ Microphone is used only to read music rhythm for the glow, never to record.
✓ Notification glow only detects that something arrived; it never reads content.
✓ Every extra permission is optional and stays off until you turn it on.

Our purpose is to add beauty, not to take anything from you.

© 2026 Ehtisham Ali (Innovation-313). All rights reserved.

GlowEdge, its design and its source code are the intellectual property of Innovation-313. Commercial use, republishing, or claiming authorship without written permission is not allowed.

Contact: aliehtisham052@gmail.com
